elements.MAIN_EFFECT: {H} You may ready target Permanent or target card in Reserve.
{R} [Exhausted Resupply].
{T} : Target Character in your Reserve gains 1 boost. Then exhaust it ({T}).  #{T} : Target Character in your Reserve gains 1 boost. Then ready it.#
{T} : Put a card from your hand in Reserve, #then exhaust it ({T}).# If you do, draw a card.

Play me for {1} less if you control an exhausted Permanent.  Play me for {1} less if there's an exhausted card in your Reserve.  {J} If there are four or more exhausted cards among Permanents you control and cards in your Reserve, ready up to two of them.
When you play a Permanent with Hand Cost {3} or more — You may exhaust me ({T}) to create a [Brassbug 2/2/2] Robot token in target Expedition.

elements.ECHO_EFFECT: {D} : The next Character played from your hand this turn activates one of its {r} abilities.

I can't be played in a starting region.  {J} My Expedition moves backwards one region.  When I leave the Expedition zone — My Expedition moves forward one region.
{J} [Resupply], then I gain 2 Move counters.  {T}, Spend 1 of my Move counters: One of your Expeditions moves backwards one region. If it does, your other Expedition moves forward one region.
{H} If I'm [In Contact], you may exchange a card from your Reserve with a card from your hand.
elements.ECHO_EFFECT: #{D} : Exchange another card from your Reserve with a card from your hand.#

elements.MAIN_EFFECT: At Dusk — If I'm [In Contact], I gain 1 boost.
elements.ECHO_EFFECT: #{D} : The next Character you play this turn gains 1 boost.#

elements.MAIN_EFFECT: {H} Target opponent reveals a random card from their hand. If I'm [In Contact], you may immediately play it for free and it gains [[Fleeting]]. If you don't, discard it.
{T} : Target a Character you control, then roll a die. On a:  • 6+, it gains [[Anchored]].  • 2-5, it gains 1 boost.  • 1, send it to Reserve.

[[Fleeting]].  Create a [Manaseed] token in target opponent's Landmarks.  Then, send to Reserve target Character they control with Base Cost {3} or less. (Its Base Cost is the Reserve Cost if it's Fleeting or the Hand Cost if not.)
{J} Each player [Resupplies].  When an opponent receives a [Gift] — You may exhaust me ({T}) to give target Character 1 boost.
When an opponent receives a [Gift] — If I have no boosts, I gain 1 boost.
{H} Target opponent #[Exhausted Resupplies].#  {H} You may target another Character with Base Cost {3} or less, it gains [[Anchored]].

The first Character you play each Afternoon gains 1 boost.
